summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LEAMSS Immigration Portal MySQL migration. All 42 backend API tests pass. Fixed 2 frontend bugs where Case Manager and Partner dashboards were calling admin-only endpoints. All 4 user roles (Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client) can now login and access their dashboards without errors.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Products and commission_history tables had 'custom' commission_type which is not a valid enum value

categories.users_api: 4/4 passed - Admin can list users, role-based access works
categories.products_api: 5/5 passed - CRUD with workflow steps works
categories.sales_api: 4/4 passed - Sales listing and stats work
categories.cases_api: 5/5 passed - Case management works for all roles
categories.reports_api: 4/4 passed - Dashboard stats and reports work
categories.role_dashboards: 4/4 passed - All role-specific dashboard endpoints work

frontend_tests.admin_dashboard: PASSED - Loads correctly with stats, navigation, tickets

features_verified: Login functionality for all 4 roles (admin, case_manager, partner, client) - VERIFIED
Dashboard loads for each role without errors - VERIFIED (after fixes)
Users API - list all users (admin only) - VERIFIED
Products API - list products with workflow steps - VERIFIED
Sales API - create sale (partner), list sales, approve sale (admin) - VERIFIED
Cases API - list cases, view case details - VERIFIED
Tickets API - create ticket, list tickets, ticket stats - VERIFIED
Documents API - list documents for case - VERIFIED
Reports API - dashboard stats, partner commissions - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: CommissionType enum only supports: fixed, percentage, tiered - 'custom' is not valid
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Fixed existing data with invalid commission_type.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MySQL migration testing complete. All APIs working correctly. Frontend dashboards fixed to use correct role-specific endpoints. Commission types supported: fixed, percentage, tiered (not 'custom'). Test file /app/tests/test_mysql_migration.py contains comprehensive tests for all endpoints.
